tasks.task_goal: Puncture the shrink-wrap on a new electronics package to start opening it
tasks.expected_outcome: A clean initial hole in the plastic film allows it to tear open easily without excessive force
required_tool_attributes: high hardness to resist tip deformation

tasks.task_goal: Vent a microwave meal by piercing the plastic film cover
tasks.expected_outcome: Small holes in the film release steam so the meal heats evenly without bursting

tasks.task_goal: Pin a printed notice to a corkboard
tasks.expected_outcome: The paper is secured to the board through a clean puncture and remains in place
required_tool_attributes: broad head to apply thumb pressure
tip hardness to penetrate cork cleanly

tasks.task_goal: Add a new hole to a leather belt for a better fit
tasks.expected_outcome: A neat, correctly placed hole is formed through the belt without tearing
required_tool_attributes: smooth, low-friction tip to pass through leather

tasks.task_goal: Pop a decorative balloon for cleanup after a party
tasks.expected_outcome: The balloon rapidly deflates with a single prick

tasks.task_goal: Open the inner foil seal on a new tube of caulk
tasks.expected_outcome: The foil barrier inside the nozzle is pierced, allowing caulk to dispense smoothly
required_tool_attributes: stiff steel rod with pointed tip
sufficient length to reach inner seal
unconventional_tools: 16d framing nail clamped in locking pliers

tasks.task_goal: Anchor a tent by driving stakes into firm soil
tasks.expected_outcome: Stakes penetrate the ground and hold under tension, keeping the tent secure
required_tool_attributes: head shape to accept mallet blows

tasks.task_goal: Aerate compacted soil in a potted plant
tasks.expected_outcome: A series of narrow holes loosens soil and improves water and air flow to roots
required_tool_attributes: smooth surface to slide through soil

tasks.task_goal: Prevent whole potatoes from bursting in the oven
tasks.expected_outcome: Pierced skins vent steam during baking, avoiding splits and mess
required_tool_attributes: point hardness to penetrate skin cleanly

tasks.task_goal: Attach retail price tags to garments
tasks.expected_outcome: The plastic fastener passes through fabric, securely joining the tag without large holes
required_tool_attributes: rigid steel needle to prevent flex
trigger mechanism to drive the fastener
unconventional_tools: ball inflation needle attached to a small syringe

tasks.task_goal: Start a small opening in drywall to pass a low-voltage cable
tasks.expected_outcome: A clean puncture creates an entry point that can be widened as needed
required_tool_attributes: rigid shaft for accurate force transfer
unconventional_tools: large finishing nail gripped with pliers

tasks.task_goal: Create a pour spout on an evaporated milk can
tasks.expected_outcome: A triangular hole in the can lid allows controlled pouring
required_tool_attributes: tip hardness to pierce thin metal
unconventional_tools: Vegetable peeler with pointed eye remover

tasks.task_goal: Release a trapped air bubble under wallpaper
tasks.expected_outcome: The bubble vents through a tiny hole and the wallpaper lies flat when smoothed
required_tool_attributes: low-diameter shaft to minimize hole visibility
smooth surface to slide in cleanly

tasks.task_goal: Add drainage holes to a plastic plant pot
tasks.expected_outcome: Several small holes through the base allow excess water to escape
required_tool_attributes: tip toughness to pierce plastic without chipping
unconventional_tools: large finishing nail (grip with pliers or wrap with cloth as a handle)
can punch opener (church key) with the pointed end

tasks.task_goal: Check if a cake is baked through
tasks.expected_outcome: Toothpick penetrates the cake and comes out clean if done, with minimal surface damage

tasks.task_goal: Thread marinated meat cubes onto skewers for grilling
tasks.expected_outcome: Meat pieces are neatly pierced and aligned on the skewer for even cooking

tasks.task_goal: Create a starter divot in wood so a drill bit won’t wander
tasks.expected_outcome: A small, conical indentation penetrates the surface fibers and guides the drill bit
required_tool_attributes: rigid, high-mass body to take hammer blows

tasks.task_goal: Break a thin ice layer on a birdbath to refresh water
tasks.expected_outcome: A puncture point fractures the ice, creating an opening for removal or melting

tasks.task_goal: Withdraw solvent from a reagent bottle without removing its rubber septum
tasks.expected_outcome: The needle pierces the septum, allowing controlled fluid withdrawal and resealing afterward

tasks.task_goal: Hang lightweight string lights on a drywall surface
tasks.expected_outcome: Pushpins penetrate the drywall paper, holding the light cord in place without large holes
required_tool_attributes: tip hardness to pierce drywall paper cleanly
